sections.heading: (1) This Act may be cited as the High Court (Amendment) Act, Short title
sections.text:
(1) This Act may be cited as the High Court (Amendment) Act, Short title
2002, and shall be read as one with the High Court Act, in this Act Cap. 27
referred to as the principal Act.

sections.heading: The principal Act is amended in section ten, by— Amendment
sections.text:
The principal Act is amended in section ten, by— Amendment
of section 10
(a) the deletion of the full stop at the end of the section and the
substitution therefor of a colon; and
(b) the insertion after the section of the following new proviso:
Provided that the Civil Court Practice 1999 (The
Green Book) of England or any other civil court practice
rules issued after 1999 in England shall not apply to
Zambia unless they relate to matrimonial causes.
Single copies of this Act may be obtained from the Government Printer,
P.O. Box 30136,10101 Lusaka. Price K500 each
